title: ricinocarpus hispidus
intro: Ricinocarpus hispidus, also known as the hispid ricinocarp, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus hispidus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urinary tract problems. Ricinocarpus hispidus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
